message:
feat(core): implement DROP TABLE support in connection layer

Add execute_drop() handler to the Connection SQL dispatch, enabling
DROP TABLE statements (with IF EXISTS support). The implementation
removes both the schema entry and the associated in-memory table
storage, and triggers persist_if_needed() for WAL consistency.

Updates the module-level doc comment and the NotImplemented error
message to reflect DROP TABLE as a supported statement type. Imports
DropObjectType from fsqlite_ast to match against the parsed AST node.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
